---
title: Examples
---

The repository includes runnable examples in `examples/`.

## JSON input

```bash
prisma-flow validate examples/basic_new_review.json
prisma-flow render examples/basic_new_review.json -o examples/output/basic_new_review.svg
```

## Python script

```bash
python examples/basic_new_review.py
```

The script writes SVG, HTML, Mermaid, and JSON outputs to `examples/output/`.

## YAML input

YAML input requires the optional YAML extra:

```bash
uv add "prisma-flow[yaml]"
prisma-flow render examples/basic_new_review.yaml -o examples/output/basic_new_review.svg
```
